# Starter Template

This is the base React application that every student builds on.

**Do not edit files in this folder directly.** Copy it into `projects/your-name/` and work there.

---

## Stack

- Vite 5
- React 18 + TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v3
- Framer Motion v11

---

## Commands

```bash
npm install      # install dependencies
npm run dev      # start dev server at http://localhost:5173
npm run build    # production build
npm run preview  # preview the production build
```
